content.text: Munich Founders Club n. e. V.
Tickets purchased for events organised by the Munich Founders Club n. e. V. are
once the purchase is completed, unless explicitly stated otherwise in the respective event description.
Under § 312g Abs. 2 Nr. 9 BGB, the statutory right of withdrawal (“Widerrufsrecht”) does
to contracts for services related to leisure activities, where the contract specifies a fixed date or period of performance.
Therefore, tickets for our events are
legally excluded from cancellation or refund
of the event is significantly changed.
In such cases, ticket holders may request either:
to a replacement event of equal value, at the organiser’s discretion.
to another person. This requires prior written approval from the organiser and does not constitute a refund.
Contact for refund or transfer requests
Munich Founders Club n. e. V.
This policy and all related transactions are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.
